headline: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for Texas Instruments Stock?
summary: Texas Instruments has notably outperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, and Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.

headline: If You Invested $1000 in Texas Instruments 10 Years Ago, This Is How Much You'd Have Now
summary: Investing in certain stocks can pay off in the long run, especially if you hold on for a decade or more.

headline: Advanced Micro Devices Data Center Business Just Went Beast Mode
summary: AMD stock hits a new 52-week high after Q1 earnings beat. Data center revenue jumps 57% as AI demand fuels a massive "server renaissance."
